_source: GET https://cdn.syndication.twimg.com/tweet-result?id=<id>&token=<t>&lang=en (public syndication endpoint). Real-shaped envelope for a 3-media tweet mixing photos and a video, used to exercise the photo-index resolver path: mediaDetails[0] and [2] are photos (no video_info), mediaDetails[1] is a video (has video_info) — so index/kind logic (photo vs video vs out-of-range) can be tested against a single fixture. Ids/urls are placeholders; the resolver host-pins media_url_https to twimg.com and forces name=orig, so token/id contents don't matter here.
